productDisplayName: J.Del Pozo Ambar Women Perfume Fragrance Gift Set
description: Gift set with a 100ml Ambar perfume bottle, a miniature Ambar bottle for your handbag and a body lotion by j. del pozo. Ladies will love the adorable little miniature bottle so grab one for yourself, now!Ambar by Jesus Del Pozo for women comes in an orange flacon with a branded charm hanging off its neck in brown twine. Ambar opens with bergamot, mandarin and cardamom, with a heart of iris flower, green tea and peony. The base notes are amber, cedar wood and sage."100 ml Ambar Eau De Toilette4 ml Ambar Eau De Toilette100 ml Ambar body lotion
